data.text: A CLASS S03 SYSTEM WITH ONE PLANET. ARRIVED HERE DUE TO TECHNICAL
PROBLEM ENCOUNTERED DURING EXPLORATION OF CYLEYLAS (16.56 LY FROM
HERE. SINCE A SCAN DETECTED BOTH SYSTEMS HAD ONE SIMILAR PLANET, AN
EPLORATION WAS PERFORMED HERE ALSO. (AND YES, THE NAMES ARE DESIGNED
TO BE CONFUSING!) ;D 2.93893886 BAL. M.; TEMP 3480K; RAD 20.0 KR;
